business.name: Dify Electrical Contracting
business.tagline: Powering Richmond's homes and businesses safely

hero.headline: *Expert electrical work* you can trust in Richmond
hero.subheadline: Licensed master electricians providing safe, code-compliant installations and repairs for homes and businesses throughout the Richmond metro area.

services_section.label: ELECTRICAL SERVICES
services_section.heading: Complete electrical solutions for your property
services_section.subheading: From panel upgrades to outlet installation, we handle all your electrical needs

services.title: Panel Upgrades & Service Changes
services.description: Upgrade outdated electrical panels to modern, code-compliant systems that can handle your power needs safely. Includes permit acquisition and inspection coordination.

services.title: Whole House Rewiring
services.description: Complete electrical system overhauls for older homes. Replace outdated wiring with modern copper systems that meet current safety standards and building codes.

services.title: Outlet & Switch Installation
services.description: Add new outlets, switches, and GFCI protection throughout your home. Perfect for kitchen remodels, home offices, and modernizing older electrical systems.

services.title: Commercial Electrical Work
services.description: Professional electrical services for businesses including lighting upgrades, machinery hookups, and electrical maintenance for retail and office spaces.

services.title: Emergency Electrical Repairs
services.description: 24/7 emergency service for power outages, electrical fires, and dangerous electrical issues. Fast response times to restore power and ensure safety.

about.heading: Richmond's trusted electrical contractors since 2010
about.body: Dify Electrical Contracting has been serving Richmond and surrounding areas with professional electrical services for over a decade. Our team of licensed master electricians brings expertise and reliability to every project, from simple repairs to complex commercial installations. We pride ourselves on clean work, fair pricing, and exceeding safety standards.

reviews.name: Sarah M.
reviews.text: Had my electrical panel upgraded last month. The team was professional, explained everything clearly, and cleaned up perfectly. Passed inspection on the first try. Would definitely use again.

reviews.name: Mike T.
reviews.text: Called for an emergency repair when half my house lost power. They came out within 2 hours and found the problem quickly. Fixed it same day and the price was very reasonable.

reviews.name: Jennifer K.
reviews.text: Rewired our 1960s home during renovation. The electricians were respectful of our space, worked around our schedule, and the final result looks great. Very knowledgeable team.

service_areas.label: SERVICE AREAS
service_areas.heading: Serving Richmond and surrounding communities
service_areas.subheading: Professional electrical services throughout the greater Richmond metro area

cta.heading: Ready for professional electrical work?
cta.body: Contact Dify Electrical Contracting today for a free estimate on your electrical project. Licensed, insured, and committed to quality workmanship.
